generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance VehicleMotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for steering and speed control"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Manages steering angle adjustments via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in vehicle environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures depth-sensed imagery for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously measures ego vehicle speed and steering angle via embedded sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Data transmission
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Generated from LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX) and depth camera (Intel D435i) data, processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Includes speed (m/s), steering angle (degrees), and position (x,y,z)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Generated object tracks from processed point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance HistoricalTrackingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of object tracks and vehicle state stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated from ACC control logic and current object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SpeedCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by ACC logic for motor actuation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCControlModel
]

instance SteeringCommandData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by ACC logic for steering servo"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCControlModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Facilitates real-time communication and component orchestration via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler, DataCollectionEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance JetsonComputeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano platform for real-time processing on vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance CloudComputeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud infrastructure for offloading ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance DBSCANClustering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm for point cloud data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudModel
]

instance KalmanFiltering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering for object tracking refinement"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for historical tracking and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalTrackingData
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D Virtual Cockpit for real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlPanelUI : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control Panel UI for remote management of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink integration for complex systems modeling and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CADIntegration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D CAD integration for virtual prototyping and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles real-time data fusion and preprocessing of sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Aggregates object tracks and ego vehicle state into structured data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Aligns message types and performs unit conversions for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Virtual Cockpit with historical data saving and reporting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, HistoricalReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano to DT cloud for distributed processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlOffloadAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote enable/disable of ACC, adjustment of desired speed, and emergency braking via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCRemoteControlAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC testing using ROS2, MATLAB/Simulink, and 3D CAD integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides TestScenarioValidationInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements ACC control logic per ISO 15622 Performance Class I with speed computation based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ACC control logic per ISO 15622 Performance Class I with speed computation based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudComputeEnabler
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Performs ACC control actions based on lead vehicle distance and current vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle state (speed, steering) and environmental perception (object tracks, projected path)"
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports of historical data including object tracks and vehicle state"
]

instance ACCControlOffloadAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Distributes ACC control processing from embedded ECU to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCRemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC system via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of desired cruise control speed via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TestScenarioValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing simulated ACC performance against real-world scenarios"
]

instance FuelOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational insights for fuel economy optimization via ACC tuning"
]

instance TroubleshootingDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Developer diagnostics data for system troubleshooting"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interactions include:
  - **ACC Controlling FE**: Computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (per ISO 15622, Performance Class I ACC) and sends commands to the vehicle’s actuators.
  - **Actuation FE**: Converts speed commands into motor voltage signals for the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller**.
  - **Emergency braking**: Implemented via direct command injection to the vehicle’s steering/speed control system.
  - **Latency constraints**: End-to-end latency ≤ **100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185), with **clock synchronization accuracy ≤ 100 ms** for distributed systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates on the following time scales:
  - **Real-Time Processing**: Data collection and object tracking occur at **perception cycle rates** (not explicitly quantified but inferred as **<100 ms latency** per ISO 3GPP 22.185).
  - **Data Storage**: Ego vehicle state and object tracks are stored in a **SQL database** externally to the vehicle, with no explicit frequency mentioned but assumed to align with real-time monitoring needs.
  - **Synchronization**: Clock synchronization between the **Physical Twin Entity** and **Digital Twin Entity** is maintained to **±100 ms accuracy**, enabling coordinated event handling."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is structured as follows:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensing (LiDAR, cameras, vehicle state)** and **actuation (motor, steering)** components, with a departure from ISO 23247 by including general automotive functionality.
    2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages **data collection, storage, and ACC control logic**, with a split into **lightweight real-time** (for timesensitive tasks) and **offline** components (for computation-intensive tasks).
    3. **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** (for monitoring) and **Control Panel FE** (for remote management).
    4. **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity data alignment.
  - **Orchestration**: Entities communicate via **ROS2 (intra-entity) and Wi-Fi (inter-entity)**, with **Data Translation FE** ensuring message compatibility."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin spans the following lifecycle stages:
  1. **Design Phase**: Used for **cyber-physical experimentation** and **ADAS system validation** via simulation (MATLAB/Simulink, ROS2).
  2. **Development Phase**: Enables **remote testing and troubleshooting** of ACC via data collection and monitoring.
  3. **Operational Phase**: Provides **real-time monitoring, optimization, and health monitoring** of the autonomous vehicle (e.g., predictive maintenance for brake systems, motor health). The DT covers the **as-operated** phase of the physical twin, with fidelity adjusted for real-world conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Verification**:
    - **ACC Control Logic**: Validated against **ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)** for safety and compliance.
    - **Real-Time Constraints**: Latency tested to **≤100 ms** (3GPP 22.185).
  - **Validation**:
    - **Cyber-Physical Experimentation**: Used for **ADAS system validation** via simulation (MATLAB/Simulink, ROS2).
    - **Data Accuracy**: LiDAR and camera data processed via **DBSCAN/Kalman filtering** for reliable object tracking.
  - **Uncertainty Management**:
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for event ordering.
    - **Data Storage**: SQL database ensures historical data integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin technical connection includes:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **ROS2 (intra-entity)**: For component communication within the vehicle.
    - **Wi-Fi (inter-entity)**: For cloud-based computation offloading and remote management.
  - **Communication Standards**:
    - **ISO 23247 (Reference Architecture)**: Adopted for entity-based design.
    - **ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)**: Standardized middleware for real-time data exchange.
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP 22.185) for real-time control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosted on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard vehicle) for real-time processing.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **cloud infrastructure** for computation offloading (e.g., ACC control logic).
  - **User Entity**: Accessible via **remote web interface** (Control Panel UI) for monitoring/management.
  - **Data Storage**: External SQL database (not specified) for historical tracking and reporting."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration involves:
  - **General Automotive Context**: Services align with broader automotive DT applications (e.g., **remote control**, **cloud-based fleet coordination** as mentioned in the abstract).
  - **V2V Communication**: Latency constraints (≤100 ms) support **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Fleet Coordination**: Not explicitly demonstrated in the case study but referenced as a broader interest in the abstract."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for DT development (adapted for automotive).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control standards (Performance Class I).
  - **ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2)**: Standard middleware for real-time communication.
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle communication latency requirements (≤100 ms)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety**:
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with **Liberty to act vs. Ability to act** taxonomy.
    - **Latency**: ≤ **100 ms** ensures safe control (3GPP TS 22.185).
    - **ACC Validation**: Implemented per **ISO 15622** (Performance Class I).
  - **Security**:
    - **Wi-Fi Communication**: Assumed to require **authentication/encryption** (not explicitly detailed in the text).
    - **Data Integrity**: Clock synchronization (±100 ms) ensures event ordering in distributed systems."
]
